title: trudoc platform-spec frontmatter verification
body:
## Outcome

Platform-spec frontmatter verification.

## Context

- Workstream **platform-spec** — normative spec on beskid-lang.org.
- Contributes to deliverable **Platform-spec cutover** (`v02-platform-spec-cutover`).
- **trudoc** Zod/frontmatter verification guards platform-spec metadata in CI.
- Normative updates live under `site/website/src/content/docs/platform-spec/` and ship via beskid-lang.org.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`139166f`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/139166f) — feat(trudoc): platform-spec frontmatter verification
